query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph in which the left two-thirds of the frame is entirely black. On the right side, a rectangular panel of textured or frosted glass is illuminated from behind, revealing the silhouetted lower legs and feet of a standing person. A watermark reading "© Epsi.dpchallenge.com" is visible near the horizontal center of the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy black and white photograph with extreme underexposure that renders most of the frame as crushed blackness, leaving only a small illuminated area of textured glass at the far right. Heavy film grain textures the lit surface, where the silhouetted legs of a figure stand partially obscured behind frosted glass and cropped by the frame edges. The unconventional composition isolates the subject against vast negative space, evoking an atmosphere of dread and voyeuristic unease.
